testsuite.name: com.qa.demoshop.tests.RegisterTest
testsuite.system-out: ===[ EXECUTION STARTED ]=== === THIS IS EXECUTING IN HEADLESS MODE=== ===[ IT IS EXECUTING IN CHROME BROWSER ]=== ===[ checkoutProductEXECUTION STARTED ]=== ===[ checkoutProduct PASSED ]=== === THIS IS EXECUTING IN HEADLESS MODE=== ===[ IT IS EXECUTING IN CHROME BROWSER ]=== ===[ verifyRegisterPageEXECUTION STARTED ]=== ===[ verifyRegisterPage PASSED ]=== === THIS IS EXECUTING IN HEADLESS MODE=== ===[ IT IS EXECUTING IN CHROME BROWSER ]=== ===[ registerShopperEXECUTION STARTED ]=== ===[ registerShopper PASSED ]===
